description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly matte gray finish accented by red and orange highlights. The body is composed of interlocking geometric panels, giving it a robust and high-tech appearance. The rifle has a large, open trigger guard and a compact, integrated stock that blends seamlessly into the rear of the weapon. Along the top, there are raised sections that may house advanced sighting systems, while the barrel is partially shrouded and extends slightly from the front. The grip and magazine area are ergonomically shaped, with visible mechanical details suggesting modularity. The overall construction suggests a weapon designed for urban tactical scenarios, prioritizing both function and modern aesthetics.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a matte gray body, red and orange accents, and a compact integrated stock. Its design features geometric panels, an open trigger guard, and advanced sighting elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and symmetrical side panels, with the muzzle and sighting elements visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular body, open trigger guard, ergonomic grip, and red/orange accent details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact integrated stock and symmetrical design, with the sighting rail visible along the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same angular features, open trigger guard, and accent colors.
